steps.title: Find the remaining total
steps.content:
The total resistance is $132$ ohms, and $3$ of the resistors have a total resistance of $84$ ohms. The other $5$ resistors have total resistance
$$
132-84=48
$$
ohms.

steps.title: Bound one resistor
steps.content: All $5$ remaining resistances are positive and have sum $48$. Therefore, one of them, $c$, must be greater than $0$ and less than $48$: $$ 0B.
